chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-270 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.4341/2025 3. For orders on M.A No.4342/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 16.02.2026 Mr. Javaid Chaudhry, advocate for the petitioner. Muhammad Imran and Ghulam Mustafa are present. = The instant petition was preferred against the judgment dated 27.10.2025 and decree dated 30.10.2025 passed by the learned Additional District Judge-I, Mirpurkhas in Family Appeal No.16/2025 whereby the learned Appellate Court has directed the petitioner to return the dowry articles or its equivalent value. On 11.02.2026, Mr. Ghulam Mustafa son of Abdul Aziz, father of respondent No.1 and Mr. Imran son of Ghulam Mustafa, brother of respondent No.1, are present in court in person and they have also filed their respective affidavits along with biometrics, stating therein that the dowry articles were received from the petitioner by them and nothing remains outstanding in respect of the claim of the dowry articles against the petitioner. They also state that in view of the second marriage of respondent No.1, she could not personally appear in court and is being represented by them. In view of the above, it appears that the grievance of the petitioner stands satisfied and the impugned judgment and decree have become infructuous. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed in above terms alongwith listed applications. JUDGE “Faisal”
